phoneticUs: 藢蓱藧ksi藞kl蓴藧ra瑟d; 藢蓱藧ksi藞kl蓴藧r瑟d; 藢蓱藧ksi藞klo蕣ra瑟d
examples: The control effect of copper oxychloride on citrus canker was studied.
Bismuth oxychloride often feels silky and not rough when rubbed between the fingers.
The yield of chlorination was 92 8%, using phosphorus oxychloride as the chlorinating agent.
